tooltips.taxids: uniprot taxonomic IDs to search (can be comma-delimited list)
tooltips.taxid_file: file containing taxonomic IDs to constrain BLAST search
tooltips.max_hits: maximum number of BLAST hits to report
tooltips.db: Database to search (swissprot: human-curated; trembl: computer curation (large); uniprot: all
tooltips.length: threshold to choose as a protein match, in % of subject length

tooltips.pdb: path to AlphaFold pdb containing pLDDT scores. If blank, will attempt to find correct one.
tooltips.evalue: if finding pdb required, E-value for BLAST results
tooltips.percent_id: if finding pdb required, %ID for good hits
tooltips.existing_AF2: set as 1 to search AFDB for existing structure prediction

tooltips.fasta: path to fasta file of sequence
tooltips.sites_file: file containing regular expressions for modifications

tooltips.scores_file: file containing amino acid scores (e.g., hydrophobicity)

tooltips.genomic_fasta: FASTA of the genomic region to search (orientation need not be known; run_genewise.py tests both strands automatically)
tooltips.genewise: path to a pre-computed Genewise .out.txt file (leave empty to run Genewise automatically via the EBI REST API)
tooltips.n_guides: maximum guide RNAs to report per insertion site
tooltips.arm_length: homology arm length in bp on each side of insertion
tooltips.PAM: IUPAC PAM sequence (e.g. NGG for SpCas9)
tooltips.cut_offset: bases upstream of PAM where the DSB occurs (SpCas9=3)
